chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 564 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2230/2022 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 09.10.2025 Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Petitioner, who appears in person in this Petition, is called absent nor any intimation is received. Perusal of the petition reflects that notification for appointment of Respondent No.4 as Dean Faculty of Law in Shah Abdul Latif University, Khairpur was challenged. Learned Additional AG while placing reliance on the case of Shahid Hussain Qureshi vs. Province of Sindh and others (PLD 2022 Sindh 260) submits that the issue involved in this Petition has already been resolved by this Court and Respondent No.4 is not on the relevant post. Under the circumstances, the instant Constitutional Petition being infructuous is hereby dismissed accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI
